creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Oh, I just noticed a severe issue:

You're installing pre-built binaries below %%DATADIR%%/util – this can't work for a port. You definitely need to add a build step for that.

Also note that %%DATADIR%% is not the correct location to install (helper) binaries. The best match for them would probably be libexec/${PORTNAME}.
